query: ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `username` varchar(64), ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `passwordHash` varchar(255), ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `emailVerified` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL
